tests.name: Syntax Check
tests.setup: python -c "import cv2; import numpy as np; import matplotlib.pyplot as plt; import ipywidgets as widgets; from IPython.display import display; import os" && pip install google ipython numpy matplotlib ipywidgets opencv-python

    "# Interactive Image Processing Application\n",
    "\n",
    "In this lab, you will build an interactive image processing application using OpenCV, Matplotlib, and ipywidgets. The application will allow you to perform various operations on an image such as converting it to grayscale, adjusting its brightness, resizing, rotating, and plotting its histogram. You will also be able to save the processed image."
   ]

   "source": [
    "# Import necessary libraries\n",
    "import cv2\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "import ipywidgets as widgets\n",
    "from IPython.display import display\n",
    "import os\n",
    "\n",
    "# Create outputs directory\n",
    "output_path = './outputs'\n",
    "os.makedirs(output_path, exist_ok=True)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Global variables\n",
    "original_bgr = None\n",
    "original_rgb = None\n",
    "processed_rgb = None\n",
    "\n",
    "# Output widgets\n",
    "msg_out = widgets.Output()\n",
    "img_out = widgets.Output()\n",
    "hist_out = widgets.Output()\n",
    "\n",
    "# Function to display images\n",
    "def show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb):\n",
    "    with img_out:\n",
    "        img_out.clear_output()\n",
    "        fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(10, 5))\n",
    "        axes[0].imshow(original_rgb)\n",
    "        axes[0].set_title('Original Image')\n",
    "        axes[0].axis('off')\n",
    "        axes[1].imshow(processed_rgb)\n",
    "        axes[1].set_title('Processed Image')\n",
    "        axes[1].axis('off')\n",
    "        plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "# Function to display histogram\n",
    "def show_histogram(processed_rgb):\n",
    "    with hist_out:\n",
    "        hist_out.clear_output()\n",
    "        gray = cv2.cvtColor(processed_rgb, cv2.COLOR_RGB2GRAY)\n",
    "        plt.figure(figsize=(5, 3))\n",
    "        plt.hist(gray.ravel(), bins=256, range=[0, 256], color='gray')\n",
    "        plt.title('Histogram')\n",
    "        plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "# Callback functions\n",
    "def on_browse_click(change):\n",
    "    from google.colab import files\n",
    "    uploaded = files.upload()\n",
    "    for fname in uploaded.keys():\n",
    "        global original_bgr, original_rgb, processed_rgb\n",
    "        original_bgr = cv2.imread(fname)\n",
    "        if original_bgr is not None:\n",
    "            original_rgb = cv2.cvtColor(original_bgr, cv2.COLOR_BGR2RGB)\n",
    "            processed_rgb = original_rgb.copy()\n",
    "            show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb)\n",
    "            with msg_out:\n",
    "                msg_out.clear_output()\n",
    "                print(f'Image loaded: {fname}')\n",
    "        else:\n",
    "            with msg_out:\n",
    "                msg_out.clear_output()\n",
    "                print('Failed to load image.')\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_grayscale_click(change):\n",
    "    global processed_rgb\n",
    "    gray = cv2.cvtColor(original_rgb, cv2.COLOR_RGB2GRAY)\n",
    "    processed_rgb = cv2.cvtColor(gray, cv2.COLOR_GRAY2RGB)\n",
    "    show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb)\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_brightness_change(change):\n",
    "    global processed_rgb\n",
    "    value = brightness_slider.value\n",
    "    processed_rgb = cv2.convertScaleAbs(original_rgb, alpha=1, beta=value)\n",
    "    show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb)\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_resize_change(change):\n",
    "    global processed_rgb\n",
    "    scale = resize_dropdown.value\n",
    "    width = int(original_rgb.shape[1] * scale)\n",
    "    height = int(original_rgb.shape[0] * scale)\n",
    "    processed_rgb = cv2.resize(original_rgb, (width, height), interpolation=cv2.INTER_AREA)\n",
    "    show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb)\n",
    "    with msg_out:\n",
    "        msg_out.clear_output()\n",
    "        print(f'Resized to: {processed_rgb.shape[1]}x{processed_rgb.shape[0]}')\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_rotation_change(change):\n",
    "    global processed_rgb\n",
    "    rotation_map = {0: cv2.ROTATE_180, 90: cv2.ROTATE_90_CLOCKWISE, 180: cv2.ROTATE_180, 270: cv2.ROTATE_90_COUNTERCLOCKWISE}\n",
    "    angle = rotation_dropdown.value\n",
    "    if angle in rotation_map:\n",
    "        processed_rgb = cv2.rotate(original_rgb, rotation_map[angle])\n",
    "        show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb)\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_histogram_click(change):\n",
    "    show_histogram(processed_rgb)\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_save_click(change):\n",
    "    global processed_rgb\n",
    "    save_name = os.path.join(output_path, 'processed_image.png')\n",
    "    cv2.imwrite(save_name, cv2.cvtColor(processed_rgb, cv2.COLOR_RGB2BGR))\n",
    "    with msg_out:\n",
    "        msg_out.clear_output()\n",
    "        print(f'Image saved as: {save_name}')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Browse Image button\n",
    "browse_button = widgets.Button(description='Browse Image')\n",
    "browse_button.on_click(on_browse_click)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Grayscale button\n",
    "grayscale_button = widgets.Button(description='Convert to Grayscale')\n",
    "grayscale_button.on_click(on_grayscale_click)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Brightness slider\n",
    "brightness_slider = widgets.IntSlider(description='Brightness', min=-100, max=100, step=1, value=0)\n",
    "brightness_slider.observe(on_brightness_change, names='value')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Resize dropdown\n",
    "resize_dropdown = widgets.Dropdown(description='Resize', options=[1.0, 0.75, 0.5], value=1.0)\n",
    "resize_dropdown.observe(on_resize_change, names='value')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Rotation dropdown\n",
    "rotation_dropdown = widgets.Dropdown(description='Rotation', options=[0, 90, 180, 270], value=0)\n",
    "rotation_dropdown.observe(on_rotation_change, names='value')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Plot Histogram button\n",
    "histogram_button = widgets.Button(description='Plot Histogram')\n",
    "histogram_button.on_click(on_histogram_click)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Save Image button\n",
    "save_button = widgets.Button(description='Save Image')\n",
    "save_button.on_click(on_save_click)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Layout\n",
    "controls = widgets.VBox([browse_button, grayscale_button, brightness_slider, resize_dropdown, rotation_dropdown, histogram_button, save_button])\n",
    "images = widgets.VBox([img_out, hist_out])\n",
    "app_layout = widgets.HBox([controls, images])\n",
    "\n",
    "# Display the app\n",
    "display(msg_out, app_layout)\n",
    "print('Please click on Browse Image to start.')\n"
   ]
  }
 ],

    "# Interactive Image Processing Application\n",
    "\n",
    "In this lab, you will build an interactive image processing application using OpenCV, Matplotlib, and ipywidgets. The application will allow you to perform various operations on an image such as converting it to grayscale, adjusting its brightness, resizing, rotating, and plotting its histogram. You will also be able to save the processed image."
   ]

   "source": [
    "# Import necessary libraries\n",
    "import cv2\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "import ipywidgets as widgets\n",
    "from IPython.display import display\n",
    "import os\n",
    "\n",
    "# Create outputs directory\n",
    "output_path = './outputs'\n",
    "os.makedirs(output_path, exist_ok=True)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Global variables\n",
    "original_bgr = None\n",
    "original_rgb = None\n",
    "processed_rgb = None\n",
    "\n",
    "# Output widgets\n",
    "msg_out = widgets.Output()\n",
    "img_out = widgets.Output()\n",
    "hist_out = widgets.Output()\n",
    "\n",
    "# Function to display images\n",
    "def show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb):\n",
    "    with img_out:\n",
    "        img_out.clear_output()\n",
    "        fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(10, 5))\n",
    "        axes[0].imshow(original_rgb)\n",
    "        axes[0].set_title('Original Image')\n",
    "        axes[0].axis('off')\n",
    "        axes[1].imshow(processed_rgb)\n",
    "        axes[1].set_title('Processed Image')\n",
    "        axes[1].axis('off')\n",
    "        plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "# Function to display histogram\n",
    "def show_histogram(processed_rgb):\n",
    "    with hist_out:\n",
    "        hist_out.clear_output()\n",
    "        gray = cv2.cvtColor(processed_rgb, cv2.COLOR_RGB2GRAY)\n",
    "        plt.figure(figsize=(5, 3))\n",
    "        plt.hist(gray.ravel(), bins=256, range=[0, 256], color='gray')\n",
    "        plt.title('Histogram')\n",
    "        plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "# Callback functions\n",
    "def on_browse_click(change):\n",
    "    from google.colab import files\n",
    "    uploaded = files.upload()\n",
    "    for fname in uploaded.keys():\n",
    "        global original_bgr, original_rgb, processed_rgb\n",
    "        original_bgr = cv2.imread(fname)\n",
    "        if original_bgr is not None:\n",
    "            original_rgb = cv2.cvtColor(original_bgr, cv2.COLOR_BGR2RGB)\n",
    "            processed_rgb = original_rgb.copy()\n",
    "            show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb)\n",
    "            with msg_out:\n",
    "                msg_out.clear_output()\n",
    "                print(f'Image loaded: {fname}')\n",
    "        else:\n",
    "            with msg_out:\n",
    "                msg_out.clear_output()\n",
    "                print('Failed to load image.')\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_grayscale_click(change):\n",
    "    global processed_rgb\n",
    "    gray = cv2.cvtColor(original_rgb, cv2.COLOR_RGB2GRAY)\n",
    "    processed_rgb = cv2.cvtColor(gray, cv2.COLOR_GRAY2RGB)\n",
    "    show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb)\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_brightness_change(change):\n",
    "    global processed_rgb\n",
    "    value = brightness_slider.value\n",
    "    processed_rgb = cv2.convertScaleAbs(original_rgb, alpha=1, beta=value)\n",
    "    show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb)\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_resize_change(change):\n",
    "    global processed_rgb\n",
    "    scale = resize_dropdown.value\n",
    "    width = int(original_rgb.shape[1] * scale)\n",
    "    height = int(original_rgb.shape[0] * scale)\n",
    "    processed_rgb = cv2.resize(original_rgb, (width, height), interpolation=cv2.INTER_AREA)\n",
    "    show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb)\n",
    "    with msg_out:\n",
    "        msg_out.clear_output()\n",
    "        print(f'Resized to: {processed_rgb.shape[1]}x{processed_rgb.shape[0]}')\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_rotation_change(change):\n",
    "    global processed_rgb\n",
    "    rotation_map = {0: cv2.ROTATE_180, 90: cv2.ROTATE_90_CLOCKWISE, 180: cv2.ROTATE_180, 270: cv2.ROTATE_90_COUNTERCLOCKWISE}\n",
    "    angle = rotation_dropdown.value\n",
    "    if angle in rotation_map:\n",
    "        processed_rgb = cv2.rotate(original_rgb, rotation_map[angle])\n",
    "        show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb)\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_histogram_click(change):\n",
    "    show_histogram(processed_rgb)\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_save_click(change):\n",
    "    global processed_rgb\n",
    "    save_name = os.path.join(output_path, 'processed_image.png')\n",
    "    cv2.imwrite(save_name, cv2.cvtColor(processed_rgb, cv2.COLOR_RGB2BGR))\n",
    "    with msg_out:\n",
    "        msg_out.clear_output()\n",
    "        print(f'Image saved as: {save_name}')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Browse Image button\n",
    "browse_button = widgets.Button(description='Browse Image')\n",
    "browse_button.on_click(on_browse_click)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Grayscale button\n",
    "grayscale_button = widgets.Button(description='Convert to Grayscale')\n",
    "grayscale_button.on_click(on_grayscale_click)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Brightness slider\n",
    "brightness_slider = widgets.IntSlider(description='Brightness', min=-100, max=100, step=1, value=0)\n",
    "brightness_slider.observe(on_brightness_change, names='value')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Resize dropdown\n",
    "resize_dropdown = widgets.Dropdown(description='Resize', options=[1.0, 0.75, 0.5], value=1.0)\n",
    "resize_dropdown.observe(on_resize_change, names='value')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Rotation dropdown\n",
    "rotation_dropdown = widgets.Dropdown(description='Rotation', options=[0, 90, 180, 270], value=0)\n",
    "rotation_dropdown.observe(on_rotation_change, names='value')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Plot Histogram button\n",
    "histogram_button = widgets.Button(description='Plot Histogram')\n",
    "histogram_button.on_click(on_histogram_click)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Save Image button\n",
    "save_button = widgets.Button(description='Save Image')\n",
    "save_button.on_click(on_save_click)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Layout\n",
    "controls = widgets.VBox([browse_button, grayscale_button, brightness_slider, resize_dropdown, rotation_dropdown, histogram_button, save_button])\n",
    "images = widgets.VBox([img_out, hist_out])\n",
    "app_layout = widgets.HBox([controls, images])\n",
    "\n",
    "# Display the app\n",
    "display(msg_out, app_layout)\n",
    "print('Please click on Browse Image to start.')\n"
   ]
  }
 ],

   "source": [
    "# Interactive Image Processing Application\n",
    "\n",
    "In this lab, you will build an interactive image processing application using OpenCV, Matplotlib, and ipywidgets. The application will allow you to perform various operations on an image such as converting it to grayscale, adjusting its brightness, resizing, rotating, and plotting its histogram. You will also be able to save the processed image."
   ]

   "source": [
    "# Import necessary libraries\n",
    "import cv2\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "import ipywidgets as widgets\n",
    "from IPython.display import display\n",
    "import os\n",
    "\n",
    "# Create outputs directory\n",
    "output_path = './outputs'\n",
    "os.makedirs(output_path, exist_ok=True)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Global variables\n",
    "original_bgr = None\n",
    "original_rgb = None\n",
    "processed_rgb = None\n",
    "\n",
    "# Output widgets\n",
    "msg_out = widgets.Output()\n",
    "img_out = widgets.Output()\n",
    "hist_out = widgets.Output()\n",
    "\n",
    "# Function to display images\n",
    "def show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb):\n",
    "    with img_out:\n",
    "        img_out.clear_output()\n",
    "        fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(10, 5))\n",
    "        axes[0].imshow(original_rgb)\n",
    "        axes[0].set_title('Original Image')\n",
    "        axes[0].axis('off')\n",
    "        axes[1].imshow(processed_rgb)\n",
    "        axes[1].set_title('Processed Image')\n",
    "        axes[1].axis('off')\n",
    "        plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "# Function to display histogram\n",
    "def show_histogram(processed_rgb):\n",
    "    with hist_out:\n",
    "        hist_out.clear_output()\n",
    "        gray = cv2.cvtColor(processed_rgb, cv2.COLOR_RGB2GRAY)\n",
    "        plt.figure(figsize=(5, 3))\n",
    "        plt.hist(gray.ravel(), bins=256, range=[0, 256], color='gray')\n",
    "        plt.title('Histogram')\n",
    "        plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "# Callback functions\n",
    "def on_browse_click(change):\n",
    "    from google.colab import files\n",
    "    uploaded = files.upload()\n",
    "    for fname in uploaded.keys():\n",
    "        global original_bgr, original_rgb, processed_rgb\n",
    "        original_bgr = cv2.imread(fname)\n",
    "        if original_bgr is not None:\n",
    "            original_rgb = cv2.cvtColor(original_bgr, cv2.COLOR_BGR2RGB)\n",
    "            processed_rgb = original_rgb.copy()\n",
    "            show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb)\n",
    "            with msg_out:\n",
    "                msg_out.clear_output()\n",
    "                print(f'Image loaded: {fname}')\n",
    "        else:\n",
    "            with msg_out:\n",
    "                msg_out.clear_output()\n",
    "                print('Failed to load image.')\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_grayscale_click(change):\n",
    "    global processed_rgb\n",
    "    gray = cv2.cvtColor(original_rgb, cv2.COLOR_RGB2GRAY)\n",
    "    processed_rgb = cv2.cvtColor(gray, cv2.COLOR_GRAY2RGB)\n",
    "    show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb)\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_brightness_change(change):\n",
    "    global processed_rgb\n",
    "    value = brightness_slider.value\n",
    "    processed_rgb = cv2.convertScaleAbs(original_rgb, alpha=1, beta=value)\n",
    "    show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb)\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_resize_change(change):\n",
    "    global processed_rgb\n",
    "    scale = resize_dropdown.value\n",
    "    width = int(original_rgb.shape[1] * scale)\n",
    "    height = int(original_rgb.shape[0] * scale)\n",
    "    processed_rgb = cv2.resize(original_rgb, (width, height), interpolation=cv2.INTER_AREA)\n",
    "    show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb)\n",
    "    with msg_out:\n",
    "        msg_out.clear_output()\n",
    "        print(f'Resized to: {processed_rgb.shape[1]}x{processed_rgb.shape[0]}')\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_rotation_change(change):\n",
    "    global processed_rgb\n",
    "    rotation_map = {0: cv2.ROTATE_180, 90: cv2.ROTATE_90_CLOCKWISE, 180: cv2.ROTATE_180, 270: cv2.ROTATE_90_COUNTERCLOCKWISE}\n",
    "    angle = rotation_dropdown.value\n",
    "    if angle in rotation_map:\n",
    "        processed_rgb = cv2.rotate(original_rgb, rotation_map[angle])\n",
    "        show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb)\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_histogram_click(change):\n",
    "    show_histogram(processed_rgb)\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_save_click(change):\n",
    "    global processed_rgb\n",
    "    save_name = os.path.join(output_path, 'processed_image.png')\n",
    "    cv2.imwrite(save_name, cv2.cvtColor(processed_rgb, cv2.COLOR_RGB2BGR))\n",
    "    with msg_out:\n",
    "        msg_out.clear_output()\n",
    "        print(f'Image saved as: {save_name}')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Browse Image button\n",
    "browse_button = widgets.Button(description='Browse Image')\n",
    "browse_button.on_click(on_browse_click)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Grayscale button\n",
    "grayscale_button = widgets.Button(description='Convert to Grayscale')\n",
    "grayscale_button.on_click(on_grayscale_click)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Brightness slider\n",
    "brightness_slider = widgets.IntSlider(description='Brightness', min=-100, max=100, step=1, value=0)\n",
    "brightness_slider.observe(on_brightness_change, names='value')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Resize dropdown\n",
    "resize_dropdown = widgets.Dropdown(description='Resize', options=[1.0, 0.75, 0.5], value=1.0)\n",
    "resize_dropdown.observe(on_resize_change, names='value')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Rotation dropdown\n",
    "rotation_dropdown = widgets.Dropdown(description='Rotation', options=[0, 90, 180, 270], value=0)\n",
    "rotation_dropdown.observe(on_rotation_change, names='value')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Plot Histogram button\n",
    "histogram_button = widgets.Button(description='Plot Histogram')\n",
    "histogram_button.on_click(on_histogram_click)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Save Image button\n",
    "save_button = widgets.Button(description='Save Image')\n",
    "save_button.on_click(on_save_click)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Layout\n",
    "controls = widgets.VBox([browse_button, grayscale_button, brightness_slider, resize_dropdown, rotation_dropdown, histogram_button, save_button])\n",
    "images = widgets.VBox([img_out, hist_out])\n",
    "app_layout = widgets.HBox([controls, images])\n",
    "\n",
    "# Display the app\n",
    "display(msg_out, app_layout)\n",
    "print('Please click on Browse Image to start.')\n"
   ]
  }
 ],

   "source": [
    "# Interactive Image Processing Application\n",
    "\n",
    "In this lab, you will build an interactive image processing application using OpenCV, Matplotlib, and ipywidgets. The application will allow you to perform various operations on an image such as converting it to grayscale, adjusting its brightness, resizing, rotating, and plotting its histogram. You will also be able to save the processed image."
   ]

   "source": [
    "# Import necessary libraries\n",
    "import cv2\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "import ipywidgets as widgets\n",
    "from IPython.display import display\n",
    "import os\n",
    "\n",
    "# Create outputs directory\n",
    "output_path = './outputs'\n",
    "os.makedirs(output_path, exist_ok=True)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Global variables\n",
    "original_bgr = None\n",
    "original_rgb = None\n",
    "processed_rgb = None\n",
    "\n",
    "# Output widgets\n",
    "msg_out = widgets.Output()\n",
    "img_out = widgets.Output()\n",
    "hist_out = widgets.Output()\n",
    "\n",
    "# Function to display images\n",
    "def show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb):\n",
    "    with img_out:\n",
    "        img_out.clear_output()\n",
    "        fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(10, 5))\n",
    "        axes[0].imshow(original_rgb)\n",
    "        axes[0].set_title('Original Image')\n",
    "        axes[0].axis('off')\n",
    "        axes[1].imshow(processed_rgb)\n",
    "        axes[1].set_title('Processed Image')\n",
    "        axes[1].axis('off')\n",
    "        plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "# Function to display histogram\n",
    "def show_histogram(processed_rgb):\n",
    "    with hist_out:\n",
    "        hist_out.clear_output()\n",
    "        gray = cv2.cvtColor(processed_rgb, cv2.COLOR_RGB2GRAY)\n",
    "        plt.figure(figsize=(5, 3))\n",
    "        plt.hist(gray.ravel(), bins=256, range=[0, 256], color='gray')\n",
    "        plt.title('Histogram')\n",
    "        plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "# Callback functions\n",
    "def on_browse_click(change):\n",
    "    from google.colab import files\n",
    "    uploaded = files.upload()\n",
    "    for fname in uploaded.keys():\n",
    "        global original_bgr, original_rgb, processed_rgb\n",
    "        original_bgr = cv2.imread(fname)\n",
    "        if original_bgr is not None:\n",
    "            original_rgb = cv2.cvtColor(original_bgr, cv2.COLOR_BGR2RGB)\n",
    "            processed_rgb = original_rgb.copy()\n",
    "            show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb)\n",
    "            with msg_out:\n",
    "                msg_out.clear_output()\n",
    "                print(f'Image loaded: {fname}')\n",
    "        else:\n",
    "            with msg_out:\n",
    "                msg_out.clear_output()\n",
    "                print('Failed to load image.')\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_grayscale_click(change):\n",
    "    global processed_rgb\n",
    "    gray = cv2.cvtColor(original_rgb, cv2.COLOR_RGB2GRAY)\n",
    "    processed_rgb = cv2.cvtColor(gray, cv2.COLOR_GRAY2RGB)\n",
    "    show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb)\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_brightness_change(change):\n",
    "    global processed_rgb\n",
    "    value = brightness_slider.value\n",
    "    processed_rgb = cv2.convertScaleAbs(original_rgb, alpha=1, beta=value)\n",
    "    show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb)\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_resize_change(change):\n",
    "    global processed_rgb\n",
    "    scale = resize_dropdown.value\n",
    "    width = int(original_rgb.shape[1] * scale)\n",
    "    height = int(original_rgb.shape[0] * scale)\n",
    "    processed_rgb = cv2.resize(original_rgb, (width, height), interpolation=cv2.INTER_AREA)\n",
    "    show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb)\n",
    "    with msg_out:\n",
    "        msg_out.clear_output()\n",
    "        print(f'Resized to: {processed_rgb.shape[1]}x{processed_rgb.shape[0]}')\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_rotation_change(change):\n",
    "    global processed_rgb\n",
    "    rotation_map = {0: cv2.ROTATE_180, 90: cv2.ROTATE_90_CLOCKWISE, 180: cv2.ROTATE_180, 270: cv2.ROTATE_90_COUNTERCLOCKWISE}\n",
    "    angle = rotation_dropdown.value\n",
    "    if angle in rotation_map:\n",
    "        processed_rgb = cv2.rotate(original_rgb, rotation_map[angle])\n",
    "        show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb)\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_histogram_click(change):\n",
    "    show_histogram(processed_rgb)\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_save_click(change):\n",
    "    global processed_rgb\n",
    "    save_name = os.path.join(output_path, 'processed_image.png')\n",
    "    cv2.imwrite(save_name, cv2.cvtColor(processed_rgb, cv2.COLOR_RGB2BGR))\n",
    "    with msg_out:\n",
    "        msg_out.clear_output()\n",
    "        print(f'Image saved as: {save_name}')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Browse Image button\n",
    "browse_button = widgets.Button(description='Browse Image')\n",
    "browse_button.on_click(on_browse_click)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Grayscale button\n",
    "grayscale_button = widgets.Button(description='Convert to Grayscale')\n",
    "grayscale_button.on_click(on_grayscale_click)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Brightness slider\n",
    "brightness_slider = widgets.IntSlider(description='Brightness', min=-100, max=100, step=1, value=0)\n",
    "brightness_slider.observe(on_brightness_change, names='value')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Resize dropdown\n",
    "resize_dropdown = widgets.Dropdown(description='Resize', options=[1.0, 0.75, 0.5], value=1.0)\n",
    "resize_dropdown.observe(on_resize_change, names='value')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Rotation dropdown\n",
    "rotation_dropdown = widgets.Dropdown(description='Rotation', options=[0, 90, 180, 270], value=0)\n",
    "rotation_dropdown.observe(on_rotation_change, names='value')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Plot Histogram button\n",
    "histogram_button = widgets.Button(description='Plot Histogram')\n",
    "histogram_button.on_click(on_histogram_click)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Save Image button\n",
    "save_button = widgets.Button(description='Save Image')\n",
    "save_button.on_click(on_save_click)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Layout\n",
    "controls = widgets.VBox([browse_button, grayscale_button, brightness_slider, resize_dropdown, rotation_dropdown, histogram_button, save_button])\n",
    "images = widgets.VBox([img_out, hist_out])\n",
    "app_layout = widgets.HBox([controls, images])\n",
    "\n",
    "# Display the app\n",
    "display(msg_out, app_layout)\n",
    "print('Please click on Browse Image to start.')\n"
   ]
  }
 ],

   "source": [
    "# Interactive Image Processing Application\n",
    "\n",
    "In this lab, you will build an interactive image processing application using OpenCV, Matplotlib, and ipywidgets. The application will allow you to perform various operations on an image such as converting it to grayscale, adjusting its brightness, resizing, rotating, and plotting its histogram. You will also be able to save the processed image."
   ]

   "source": [
    "# Import necessary libraries\n",
    "import cv2\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "import ipywidgets as widgets\n",
    "from IPython.display import display\n",
    "import os\n",
    "\n",
    "# Create outputs directory\n",
    "output_path = './outputs'\n",
    "os.makedirs(output_path, exist_ok=True)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Global variables\n",
    "original_bgr = None\n",
    "original_rgb = None\n",
    "processed_rgb = None\n",
    "\n",
    "# Output widgets\n",
    "msg_out = widgets.Output()\n",
    "img_out = widgets.Output()\n",
    "hist_out = widgets.Output()\n",
    "\n",
    "# Function to display images\n",
    "def show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb):\n",
    "    with img_out:\n",
    "        img_out.clear_output()\n",
    "        fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(10, 5))\n",
    "        axes[0].imshow(original_rgb)\n",
    "        axes[0].set_title('Original Image')\n",
    "        axes[0].axis('off')\n",
    "        axes[1].imshow(processed_rgb)\n",
    "        axes[1].set_title('Processed Image')\n",
    "        axes[1].axis('off')\n",
    "        plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "# Function to display histogram\n",
    "def show_histogram(processed_rgb):\n",
    "    with hist_out:\n",
    "        hist_out.clear_output()\n",
    "        gray = cv2.cvtColor(processed_rgb, cv2.COLOR_RGB2GRAY)\n",
    "        plt.figure(figsize=(5, 3))\n",
    "        plt.hist(gray.ravel(), bins=256, range=[0, 256], color='gray')\n",
    "        plt.title('Histogram')\n",
    "        plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "# Callback functions\n",
    "def on_browse_click(change):\n",
    "    from google.colab import files\n",
    "    uploaded = files.upload()\n",
    "    for fname in uploaded.keys():\n",
    "        global original_bgr, original_rgb, processed_rgb\n",
    "        original_bgr = cv2.imread(fname)\n",
    "        if original_bgr is not None:\n",
    "            original_rgb = cv2.cvtColor(original_bgr, cv2.COLOR_BGR2RGB)\n",
    "            processed_rgb = original_rgb.copy()\n",
    "            show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb)\n",
    "            with msg_out:\n",
    "                msg_out.clear_output()\n",
    "                print(f'Image loaded: {fname}')\n",
    "        else:\n",
    "            with msg_out:\n",
    "                msg_out.clear_output()\n",
    "                print('Failed to load image.')\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_grayscale_click(change):\n",
    "    global processed_rgb\n",
    "    gray = cv2.cvtColor(original_rgb, cv2.COLOR_RGB2GRAY)\n",
    "    processed_rgb = cv2.cvtColor(gray, cv2.COLOR_GRAY2RGB)\n",
    "    show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb)\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_brightness_change(change):\n",
    "    global processed_rgb\n",
    "    value = brightness_slider.value\n",
    "    processed_rgb = cv2.convertScaleAbs(original_rgb, alpha=1, beta=value)\n",
    "    show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb)\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_resize_change(change):\n",
    "    global processed_rgb\n",
    "    scale = resize_dropdown.value\n",
    "    width = int(original_rgb.shape[1] * scale)\n",
    "    height = int(original_rgb.shape[0] * scale)\n",
    "    processed_rgb = cv2.resize(original_rgb, (width, height), interpolation=cv2.INTER_AREA)\n",
    "    show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb)\n",
    "    with msg_out:\n",
    "        msg_out.clear_output()\n",
    "        print(f'Resized to: {processed_rgb.shape[1]}x{processed_rgb.shape[0]}')\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_rotation_change(change):\n",
    "    global processed_rgb\n",
    "    rotation_map = {0: cv2.ROTATE_180, 90: cv2.ROTATE_90_CLOCKWISE, 180: cv2.ROTATE_180, 270: cv2.ROTATE_90_COUNTERCLOCKWISE}\n",
    "    angle = rotation_dropdown.value\n",
    "    if angle in rotation_map:\n",
    "        processed_rgb = cv2.rotate(original_rgb, rotation_map[angle])\n",
    "        show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb)\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_histogram_click(change):\n",
    "    show_histogram(processed_rgb)\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_save_click(change):\n",
    "    global processed_rgb\n",
    "    save_name = os.path.join(output_path, 'processed_image.png')\n",
    "    cv2.imwrite(save_name, cv2.cvtColor(processed_rgb, cv2.COLOR_RGB2BGR))\n",
    "    with msg_out:\n",
    "        msg_out.clear_output()\n",
    "        print(f'Image saved as: {save_name}')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Browse Image button\n",
    "browse_button = widgets.Button(description='Browse Image')\n",
    "browse_button.on_click(on_browse_click)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Grayscale button\n",
    "grayscale_button = widgets.Button(description='Convert to Grayscale')\n",
    "grayscale_button.on_click(on_grayscale_click)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Brightness slider\n",
    "brightness_slider = widgets.IntSlider(description='Brightness', min=-100, max=100, step=1, value=0)\n",
    "brightness_slider.observe(on_brightness_change, names='value')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Resize dropdown\n",
    "resize_dropdown = widgets.Dropdown(description='Resize', options=[1.0, 0.75, 0.5], value=1.0)\n",
    "resize_dropdown.observe(on_resize_change, names='value')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Rotation dropdown\n",
    "rotation_dropdown = widgets.Dropdown(description='Rotation', options=[0, 90, 180, 270], value=0)\n",
    "rotation_dropdown.observe(on_rotation_change, names='value')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Plot Histogram button\n",
    "histogram_button = widgets.Button(description='Plot Histogram')\n",
    "histogram_button.on_click(on_histogram_click)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Save Image button\n",
    "save_button = widgets.Button(description='Save Image')\n",
    "save_button.on_click(on_save_click)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Layout\n",
    "controls = widgets.VBox([browse_button, grayscale_button, brightness_slider, resize_dropdown, rotation_dropdown, histogram_button, save_button])\n",
    "images = widgets.VBox([img_out, hist_out])\n",
    "app_layout = widgets.HBox([controls, images])\n",
    "\n",
    "# Display the app\n",
    "display(msg_out, app_layout)\n",
    "print('Please click on Browse Image to start.')\n"
   ]
  }
 ],

    "# Interactive Image Processing Application\n",
    "\n",
    "In this lab, you will build an interactive image processing application using OpenCV, Matplotlib, and ipywidgets. The application will allow you to perform various operations on an image such as converting it to grayscale, adjusting its brightness, resizing, rotating, and plotting its histogram. You will also be able to save the processed image."

   "source": [
    "# Import necessary libraries\n",
    "import cv2\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "import ipywidgets as widgets\n",
    "from IPython.display import display\n",
    "import os\n",
    "\n",
    "# Create outputs directory\n",
    "output_path = './outputs'\n",
    "os.makedirs(output_path, exist_ok=True)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Global variables\n",
    "original_bgr = None\n",
    "original_rgb = None\n",
    "processed_rgb = None\n",
    "\n",
    "# Output widgets\n",
    "msg_out = widgets.Output()\n",
    "img_out = widgets.Output()\n",
    "hist_out = widgets.Output()\n",
    "\n",
    "# Function to display images\n",
    "def show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb):\n",
    "    with img_out:\n",
    "        img_out.clear_output()\n",
    "        fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(10, 5))\n",
    "        axes[0].imshow(original_rgb)\n",
    "        axes[0].set_title('Original Image')\n",
    "        axes[0].axis('off')\n",
    "        axes[1].imshow(processed_rgb)\n",
    "        axes[1].set_title('Processed Image')\n",
    "        axes[1].axis('off')\n",
    "        plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "# Function to display histogram\n",
    "def show_histogram(processed_rgb):\n",
    "    with hist_out:\n",
    "        hist_out.clear_output()\n",
    "        gray = cv2.cvtColor(processed_rgb, cv2.COLOR_RGB2GRAY)\n",
    "        plt.figure(figsize=(5, 3))\n",
    "        plt.hist(gray.ravel(), bins=256, range=[0, 256], color='gray')\n",
    "        plt.title('Histogram')\n",
    "        plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "# Callback functions\n",
    "def on_browse_click(change):\n",
    "    from google.colab import files\n",
    "    uploaded = files.upload()\n",
    "    for fname in uploaded.keys():\n",
    "        global original_bgr, original_rgb, processed_rgb\n",
    "        original_bgr = cv2.imread(fname)\n",
    "        if original_bgr is not None:\n",
    "            original_rgb = cv2.cvtColor(original_bgr, cv2.COLOR_BGR2RGB)\n",
    "            processed_rgb = original_rgb.copy()\n",
    "            show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb)\n",
    "            with msg_out:\n",
    "                msg_out.clear_output()\n",
    "                print(f'Image loaded: {fname}')\n",
    "        else:\n",
    "            with msg_out:\n",
    "                msg_out.clear_output()\n",
    "                print('Failed to load image.')\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_grayscale_click(change):\n",
    "    global processed_rgb\n",
    "    gray = cv2.cvtColor(original_rgb, cv2.COLOR_RGB2GRAY)\n",
    "    processed_rgb = cv2.cvtColor(gray, cv2.COLOR_GRAY2RGB)\n",
    "    show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb)\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_brightness_change(change):\n",
    "    global processed_rgb\n",
    "    value = brightness_slider.value\n",
    "    processed_rgb = cv2.convertScaleAbs(original_rgb, alpha=1, beta=value)\n",
    "    show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb)\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_resize_change(change):\n",
    "    global processed_rgb\n",
    "    scale = resize_dropdown.value\n",
    "    width = int(original_rgb.shape[1] * scale)\n",
    "    height = int(original_rgb.shape[0] * scale)\n",
    "    processed_rgb = cv2.resize(original_rgb, (width, height), interpolation=cv2.INTER_AREA)\n",
    "    show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb)\n",
    "    with msg_out:\n",
    "        msg_out.clear_output()\n",
    "        print(f'Resized to: {processed_rgb.shape[1]}x{processed_rgb.shape[0]}')\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_rotation_change(change):\n",
    "    global processed_rgb\n",
    "    rotation_map = {0: cv2.ROTATE_180, 90: cv2.ROTATE_90_CLOCKWISE, 180: cv2.ROTATE_180, 270: cv2.ROTATE_90_COUNTERCLOCKWISE}\n",
    "    angle = rotation_dropdown.value\n",
    "    if angle in rotation_map:\n",
    "        processed_rgb = cv2.rotate(original_rgb, rotation_map[angle])\n",
    "        show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb)\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_histogram_click(change):\n",
    "    show_histogram(processed_rgb)\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_save_click(change):\n",
    "    global processed_rgb\n",
    "    save_name = os.path.join(output_path, 'processed_image.png')\n",
    "    cv2.imwrite(save_name, cv2.cvtColor(processed_rgb, cv2.COLOR_RGB2BGR))\n",
    "    with msg_out:\n",
    "        msg_out.clear_output()\n",
    "        print(f'Image saved as: {save_name}')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Browse Image button\n",
    "browse_button = widgets.Button(description='Browse Image')\n",
    "browse_button.on_click(on_browse_click)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Grayscale button\n",
    "grayscale_button = widgets.Button(description='Convert to Grayscale')\n",
    "grayscale_button.on_click(on_grayscale_click)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Brightness slider\n",
    "brightness_slider = widgets.IntSlider(description='Brightness', min=-100, max=100, step=1, value=0)\n",
    "brightness_slider.observe(on_brightness_change, names='value')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Resize dropdown\n",
    "resize_dropdown = widgets.Dropdown(description='Resize', options=[1.0, 0.75, 0.5], value=1.0)\n",
    "resize_dropdown.observe(on_resize_change, names='value')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Rotation dropdown\n",
    "rotation_dropdown = widgets.Dropdown(description='Rotation', options=[0, 90, 180, 270], value=0)\n",
    "rotation_dropdown.observe(on_rotation_change, names='value')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Plot Histogram button\n",
    "histogram_button = widgets.Button(description='Plot Histogram')\n",
    "histogram_button.on_click(on_histogram_click)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Save Image button\n",
    "save_button = widgets.Button(description='Save Image')\n",
    "save_button.on_click(on_save_click)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Layout\n",
    "controls = widgets.VBox([browse_button, grayscale_button, brightness_slider, resize_dropdown, rotation_dropdown, histogram_button, save_button])\n",
    "images = widgets.VBox([img_out, hist_out])\n",
    "app_layout = widgets.HBox([controls, images])\n",
    "\n",
    "# Display the app\n",
    "display(msg_out, app_layout)\n",
    "print('Please click on Browse Image to start.')\n"
   ]
  }
 ],

    "# Interactive Image Processing Application\n",
    "\n",
    "In this lab, you will build an interactive image processing application using OpenCV, Matplotlib, and ipywidgets. The application will allow you to perform various operations on an image such as converting it to grayscale, adjusting its brightness, resizing, rotating, and plotting its histogram. You will also be able to save the processed image."
   ]

   "source": [
    "# Import necessary libraries\n",
    "import cv2\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "import ipywidgets as widgets\n",
    "from IPython.display import display\n",
    "import os\n",
    "\n",
    "# Create outputs directory\n",
    "output_path = './outputs'\n",
    "os.makedirs(output_path, exist_ok=True)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Global variables\n",
    "original_bgr = None\n",
    "original_rgb = None\n",
    "processed_rgb = None\n",
    "\n",
    "# Output widgets\n",
    "msg_out = widgets.Output()\n",
    "img_out = widgets.Output()\n",
    "hist_out = widgets.Output()\n",
    "\n",
    "# Function to display images\n",
    "def show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb):\n",
    "    with img_out:\n",
    "        img_out.clear_output()\n",
    "        fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(10, 5))\n",
    "        axes[0].imshow(original_rgb)\n",
    "        axes[0].set_title('Original Image')\n",
    "        axes[0].axis('off')\n",
    "        axes[1].imshow(processed_rgb)\n",
    "        axes[1].set_title('Processed Image')\n",
    "        axes[1].axis('off')\n",
    "        plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "# Function to display histogram\n",
    "def show_histogram(processed_rgb):\n",
    "    with hist_out:\n",
    "        hist_out.clear_output()\n",
    "        gray = cv2.cvtColor(processed_rgb, cv2.COLOR_RGB2GRAY)\n",
    "        plt.figure(figsize=(5, 3))\n",
    "        plt.hist(gray.ravel(), bins=256, range=[0, 256], color='gray')\n",
    "        plt.title('Histogram')\n",
    "        plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "# Callback functions\n",
    "def on_browse_click(change):\n",
    "    from google.colab import files\n",
    "    uploaded = files.upload()\n",
    "    for fname in uploaded.keys():\n",
    "        global original_bgr, original_rgb, processed_rgb\n",
    "        original_bgr = cv2.imread(fname)\n",
    "        if original_bgr is not None:\n",
    "            original_rgb = cv2.cvtColor(original_bgr, cv2.COLOR_BGR2RGB)\n",
    "            processed_rgb = original_rgb.copy()\n",
    "            show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb)\n",
    "            with msg_out:\n",
    "                msg_out.clear_output()\n",
    "                print(f'Image loaded: {fname}')\n",
    "        else:\n",
    "            with msg_out:\n",
    "                msg_out.clear_output()\n",
    "                print('Failed to load image.')\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_grayscale_click(change):\n",
    "    global processed_rgb\n",
    "    gray = cv2.cvtColor(original_rgb, cv2.COLOR_RGB2GRAY)\n",
    "    processed_rgb = cv2.cvtColor(gray, cv2.COLOR_GRAY2RGB)\n",
    "    show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb)\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_brightness_change(change):\n",
    "    global processed_rgb\n",
    "    value = brightness_slider.value\n",
    "    processed_rgb = cv2.convertScaleAbs(original_rgb, alpha=1, beta=value)\n",
    "    show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb)\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_resize_change(change):\n",
    "    global processed_rgb\n",
    "    scale = resize_dropdown.value\n",
    "    width = int(original_rgb.shape[1] * scale)\n",
    "    height = int(original_rgb.shape[0] * scale)\n",
    "    processed_rgb = cv2.resize(original_rgb, (width, height), interpolation=cv2.INTER_AREA)\n",
    "    show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb)\n",
    "    with msg_out:\n",
    "        msg_out.clear_output()\n",
    "        print(f'Resized to: {processed_rgb.shape[1]}x{processed_rgb.shape[0]}')\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_rotation_change(change):\n",
    "    global processed_rgb\n",
    "    rotation_map = {0: cv2.ROTATE_180, 90: cv2.ROTATE_90_CLOCKWISE, 180: cv2.ROTATE_180, 270: cv2.ROTATE_90_COUNTERCLOCKWISE}\n",
    "    angle = rotation_dropdown.value\n",
    "    if angle in rotation_map:\n",
    "        processed_rgb = cv2.rotate(original_rgb, rotation_map[angle])\n",
    "        show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb)\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_histogram_click(change):\n",
    "    show_histogram(processed_rgb)\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_save_click(change):\n",
    "    global processed_rgb\n",
    "    save_name = os.path.join(output_path, 'processed_image.png')\n",
    "    cv2.imwrite(save_name, cv2.cvtColor(processed_rgb, cv2.COLOR_RGB2BGR))\n",
    "    with msg_out:\n",
    "        msg_out.clear_output()\n",
    "        print(f'Image saved as: {save_name}')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Browse Image button\n",
    "browse_button = widgets.Button(description='Browse Image')\n",
    "browse_button.on_click(on_browse_click)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Grayscale button\n",
    "grayscale_button = widgets.Button(description='Convert to Grayscale')\n",
    "grayscale_button.on_click(on_grayscale_click)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Brightness slider\n",
    "brightness_slider = widgets.IntSlider(description='Brightness', min=-100, max=100, step=1, value=0)\n",
    "brightness_slider.observe(on_brightness_change, names='value')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Resize dropdown\n",
    "resize_dropdown = widgets.Dropdown(description='Resize', options=[1.0, 0.75, 0.5], value=1.0)\n",
    "resize_dropdown.observe(on_resize_change, names='value')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Rotation dropdown\n",
    "rotation_dropdown = widgets.Dropdown(description='Rotation', options=[0, 90, 180, 270], value=0)\n",
    "rotation_dropdown.observe(on_rotation_change, names='value')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Plot Histogram button\n",
    "histogram_button = widgets.Button(description='Plot Histogram')\n",
    "histogram_button.on_click(on_histogram_click)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Save Image button\n",
    "save_button = widgets.Button(description='Save Image')\n",
    "save_button.on_click(on_save_click)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Layout\n",
    "controls = widgets.VBox([browse_button, grayscale_button, brightness_slider, resize_dropdown, rotation_dropdown, histogram_button, save_button])\n",
    "images = widgets.VBox([img_out, hist_out])\n",
    "app_layout = widgets.HBox([controls, images])\n",
    "\n",
    "# Display the app\n",
    "display(msg_out, app_layout)\n",
    "print('Please click on Browse Image to start.')\n"
   ]
  }
 ],
